name: Fort Smith
content: On a map, downtown Fort Smith looks like it should be an interesting place. In reality, Fort Smith sucks. I was only there for one night and didn’t have much time to explore, but the downtown area felt five times bigger than there were people to fill it. There were plenty of shops and restaurants, but all were empty. There were only a handful of other people around. I’ve seen bigger weeknight crowds in smaller towns. Overall it was very offputting. Or maybe it was just Tuesday.
